data.title: dso shim fails with 'command not found: worktree-sync-from-main.sh' — script does not exist in plugin scripts directory
data.description: Observed in host project: .claude/scripts/dso worktree-sync-from-main.sh exits 127 with 'command not found'. The dso shim looks for plugins/dso/scripts/worktree-sync-from-main.sh but the script does not exist.
